overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt riding a horse through a medieval fantasy town at night. The character navigates narrow cobblestone streets, elevated ramparts, and tunnels illuminated by torchlight, with historic stone and timber-framed architecture throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow medieval town street with stone archways

events.description: passes through large stone archway into wider cobblestone street
horse accelerates from trot to canter as street opens into square

agents.ego_description: riding a horse through narrow cobblestone streets, navigating under stone arches and past timber buildings

notable_agents.action: guard in red cloak standing near building entrance holding a torch

entered.detail: large medieval stone archway spanning the cobblestone street with iron lanterns
half-timbered medieval house with warm lit windows and dark wooden beams
wall-mounted iron torch lantern with flickering flame
wet cobblestone road surface reflecting orange torchlight
stone block building with arched doorway and small windows

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow medieval street enclosed by stone and timber buildings. The character rides a horse under a large stone archway, passing wall-mounted torches that cast warm light on the wet cobblestones. A guard stands near a building entrance on the right as the horse transitions from a trot to a canter.

scene_state.functional_zone: town square leading to harbor overlook with stone stairs

events.description: exits narrow street into open town square with wooden market stalls
begins ascending wide stone staircase to upper level
reaches top of stairs and emerges onto elevated walkway with harbor view

agents.ego_description: riding up stone stairs to an elevated position overlooking the harbor, then beginning descent

entered.detail: wide stone stairs with worn steps leading up to the rampart level
wooden market cart with canvas cover and barrels
dark water visible beyond the stone walls of the harbor
crenellated stone wall along the elevated defensive walkway

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the narrow street into an open town square, then ascends a wide stone staircase to an elevated walkway. From the rampart, the harbor water is visible in the distance beyond the stone walls. The segment ends as the character begins descending from the upper level.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated defensive rampart overlooking the town

events.description: slows to a trot while navigating the narrow rampart path with battlements

agents.ego_description: cantering along the elevated rampart with view of the town rooftops below, passing large torch braziers

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in brown cloak walking along the rampart in the opposite direction

entered.detail: large stone brazier with bright burning fire on the battlement wall
tall stone tower with pointed roof visible in the background against the night sky
cluster of medieval rooftops and chimneys visible below the rampart

segments.scene_description: The character rides along an elevated stone rampart with crenellated battlements on the right. Large torch braziers illuminate the path, casting light on the town rooftops visible below to the left. A distant tower rises against the dark sky ahead as the character passes a pedestrian walking in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower town market street with tunnels and timber buildings

events.description: enters dark stone tunnel passing under timber-framed buildings
exits tunnel into open town square with stone fountain and market stalls

agents.ego_description: riding through lower town streets, passing market stalls and timber buildings, navigating through tunnels

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red cloak standing near timber building entrance

entered.detail: dark stone tunnel entrance with arched top passing under buildings
wooden market stall with red and white striped canvas awning
octagonal stone fountain in the center of the town square
red and gold triangular banners strung across the street between buildings

segments.scene_description: The character descends from the rampart and enters a dark stone tunnel, emerging into a lower town square with a stone fountain and market stalls. The street is lined with timber-framed buildings and decorated with red banners strung overhead. The character rides past pedestrians and wooden carts as the video ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from the claustrophobic confines of a narrow medieval street to the open, bustling atmosphere of a lower town square. It begins with a horse riding under a stone archway, passing wall-mounted torches that illuminate wet cobblestones and a stationed guard. As the path opens into a town square, the camera ascends a wide stone staircase to an elevated rampart, revealing a distant harbor beyond the walls before moving along crenellated battlements lit by large torch braziers. The scene then shifts as the character descends from the heights and passes through a dark stone tunnel, emerging into a lower square filled with market stalls and red banners. Finally, the movement concludes by riding past wooden carts and pedestrians amidst a backdrop of timber-framed buildings and a central stone fountain.
